text:
(In reply to Zsolt Udvari from comment #15)
 $ /usr/local/share/geogebra/jre1.7.0_45-i686/bin/java -Xms32m -Xmx1024m -Dawt.useSystemAAFontSettings=on -cp /usr/local/share/geogebra/geogebra/geogebra.jar -Xbootclasspath/a:/usr/local/share/geogebra/jre1.7.0_45-i686/bin/../lib/jfxrt.jar org.geogebra.desktop.GeoGebra3D --showSplash=false --settingsfile=/usr/local/share/geogebra/.config/geogebra/geogebra.properties --settingsfile=/usr/local/share/geogebra/geogebra.properties
